chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA Constt. Petition No. S- 206 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For non-prosecution. 24.07.2025. Mr. Aftab Nek Muhammad Bhutto, Assistant Advocate General, Sindh. ------------ None present for the petitioner. No intimation is received. This Constitutional Petition has been filed for protection allegedly caused by official respondents at the behest of private respondents. Record reflects that this petition was filed on 24.06.2025, thereafter Petitioner and his Counsel did not bother to deposit cost or pursue this matter which prima facie suggests that either the grievance of the petitioner has been served or the Petitioner has lost interest to pursue the matter. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. J U D G E S.Ashfaq
